steps.title: Use the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants to indicate the year the Schomburg Center was founded. The notes give that year directly: 1925.

steps.title: Discard irrelevant details
steps.content: Choice A identifies the person the center was named for. Choice B says it is a research library. Choice D gives its location in New York City. None of those details states the founding year, so the sentence focused on 1925 fits the goal. The answer is C.
